mapper.select: SELECT item_num AS num, name AS name, type AS type FROM item WHERE type IN ('MATERIAL', 'SEMIPRODUCT', 'RAW', 'PRODUCT') ORDER BY type, name

SELECT l.lot_num, l.lot_code, l.expiry_date, l.item_num, l.lot_date, l.init_qty, l.current_qty, i.name AS item_name, i.code, i.type FROM lot l LEFT JOIN item i ON l.item_num = i.item_num WHERE l.lot_code = #{lot_code}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO lot (lot_num, lot_code, item_num, order_num, init_qty, current_qty, lot_date, expiry_date) VALUES ( #{lot_num}, 'LOT-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || #{lot_num}, #{item_num}, #{order_num}, #{init_qty}, #{current_qty}, '생산완료', SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{type} = 'SEMIPRODUCT' THEN SYSDATE + 10 ELSE SYSDATE + 20 END )
mapper.select: SELECT l.lot_num, l.current_qty, l.lot_date, (SELECT MIN(io2.qc_num) FROM io io2 JOIN qc q2 ON io2.qc_num = q2.qc_num WHERE io2.lot_num = l.lot_num AND UPPER(q2.qc_pass) = 'PASS') AS qc_num FROM lot l WHERE l.item_num = #{item_num} AND l.current_qty > 0 AND l.expiry_date >= SYSDATE AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM io i JOIN qc q ON i.qc_num = q.qc_num WHERE i.lot_num = l.lot_num AND UPPER(q.qc_pass) = 'PASS' ) ORDER BY l.lot_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lot_relation (lot_relation_num, lot_parent, lot_child) VALUES (LOT_RELATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{parent_lot_num}, #{child_lot_num})
mapper.select:
SELECT lr.lot_parent AS parent_lot_num, lr.lot_child AS child_lot_num, l.lot_code AS parent_lot_code, i.name AS item_name, l.lot_date
FROM lot_relation lr JOIN lot l ON lr.lot_parent = l.lot_num JOIN item i ON l.item_num = i.item_num WHERE lr.lot_child = #{lot_num}

SELECT lr.lot_parent AS parent_lot_num, lr.lot_child AS child_lot_num, l.lot_code AS child_lot_code, i.name AS item_name FROM lot_relation lr JOIN lot l ON lr.lot_child = l.lot_num JOIN item i ON l.item_num = i.item_num WHERE lr.lot_parent = #{lot_num}
